dialogue.name: Venkatesh
pages: Namaskara! Welcome to UB City side. Very posh area, no?
This area used to be all gardens and old bungalows. Now all malls only.
My father had a small shop here. Now see -- glass buildings everywhere. Bengaluru is changing, saar.

active.name: Venkatesh
pages: Raju's coffee challenge? Go inside the coffee shop and try their filter coffee.
The counter inside has very good coffee -- different style from Raju's.

afterObjective.name: Venkatesh
pages: Already tried the coffee inside? Good, good. Now go complete Raju's challenge!
